home.findNextPlace: Find Your Next Place to Visit
home.discoverAmazing: Discover amazing places at exclusive deals and enjoy your holiday
home.whereWouldYouLikeToGo: Where would you like to go?
home.customizedPrivateStays: Customized and private stays, cruises and excursions
home.egyptTourDescriptionLine1: We offer an unforgettable tour of Egypt, showcasing iconic sites while exploring charming, off-the-beaten-path locations. We ensure your trip unfolds at a comfortable pace, allowing you to savor the authentic wonders of this magnificent country.
home.uniqueExperienceLine: of traditional tour operators and let us offer you a unique experience.
home.toursAreSuggestions: The tours presented on our website are suggestions, but we are fully available to customize your trip to your exact preferences. Don't hesitate to
home.tailorMadeJourneyEnding: in creating a tailor-made journey that meets your expectations.
home.bookingDescription: Book your trip in one click with our easy-to-use booking system.
home.offerDescription: Get the best deals and offers on your favorite travel packages.
home.expertiseDescription: Travel with confidence backed by 35 years of experience.
home.ourToursWithCruise: Our tours in Egypt with a cruise
home.ourToursWithCruiseDescription: Let our professionals take you and guide you! The felucca or dahabieh, charming sailing boats typical of Egypt, and cruise ships are dream solutions for discovering Egypt's historical sites, as well as timeless places and off-the-beaten-path locations; enjoy the magical atmosphere of the Nile or the wonders of Lake Nasser.
home.journeysDiscoverEgypt: Journeys to discover the marvelous Egypt
home.journeysDiscoverEgyptDescription: Your French-speaking Egyptologist guide will take care of you! He will accompany you from your arrival at the airport or departure from your hotel, pamper you until your return, and create a unique and exclusive stay just for you, off the beaten track...
home.staysWesternDesert: Stays in the heart of Egypt's western desert
home.staysWesternDesertDescription: Going to the Egyptian desert and its oases is a completely different way to experience this wonderful country of Egypt alongside your private guide.
home.travelInspirationsDescription: A curated list of inspiration the most tour & travel based on different destinations.
home.generalQuestionsDescription: We're committed to offering more than just products-we provide exceptional experiences.

slider.captionMain3: Let's make your best trip with us

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Journeying through time in the land of legends.
about.welcomeTitle: Welcome to scarabee voyageur - Your Gateway to Unforgettable Journeys!
about.paragraph1: scarabee voyageur is a trusted name in the travel industry, offering seamless travel planning, personalized itineraries, and unforgettable adventures. With years of experience and a network of global partners, we ensure a hassle-free and memorable journey for every traveler.
about.paragraph2: We believe that travel is more than just moving from one place to another-it's about discovering new cultures, creating unforgettable experiences, and making lifelong memories.
